# Getting Started

Welcome to the vault! This note explains how things are organized.

## Project Notes

Check out the [[rust-mcp]] project for the main server implementation.
Also see [[python-tools]] for companion scripts.

## Navigation Tips

Use tags like #project to find all project notes.
Nested directories like `Notes/deep/` hold specialized content.

See [[nested-note]] for an example of deep nesting.
